c.description: Net Present Value (NPV) of mining block i in period tau

G_min.description: Minimum allowed average ore grade in any period

G_max.description: Maximum allowed average ore grade in any period

MC_min.description: Minimum per-period total mining capacity (ore + waste)

MC_max.description: Maximum per-period total mining capacity (ore + waste)

P.description: Precedence matrix: P[i][j] = 1 if block i must be mined before block j

assumptions.description: Number of scheduling periods is positive.
NPV of each block in each period is non-negative.

code.python: assert all(c[i][tau] >= 0 for i in range(n) for tau in range(t))

assumptions.description: Ore grade of each block is non-negative.

code.python: assert all(g[i] >= 0 for i in range(n))

assumptions.description: Ore tonnage of each block is non-negative.

code.python: assert all(O[i] >= 0 for i in range(n))

assumptions.description: Waste tonnage of each block is non-negative.

code.python: assert all(W[i] >= 0 for i in range(n))

assumptions.description: Minimum grade bound does not exceed maximum grade bound.
Minimum processing capacity does not exceed maximum processing capacity.
Minimum mining capacity does not exceed maximum mining capacity.

x.description: Binary indicator: 1 if block i is mined in period tau, 0 otherwise

constraints.description: Upper grade blending constraint: weighted average ore grade does not exceed G_max in each period.
Lower grade blending constraint: weighted average ore grade is at least G_min in each period.
Each block is mined at most once over the entire planning horizon.
Ore processing capacity upper bound per period.
Ore processing capacity lower bound per period.
Total mining capacity (ore + waste) upper bound per period.
Total mining capacity (ore + waste) lower bound per period.
Precedence constraint: block j may be mined in period tau only after all required predecessors i (P[i][j]=1) have been mined by period tau.
constraints.formulation: \sum_{\tau'=1}^{\tau} x_i^{\tau'} \geq x_j^\tau \quad \forall \tau \in T,\; \forall i,j \in I \text{ with } P_{ij}=1

objective.description: Maximize total discounted Net Present Value (NPV) across all blocks and periods.

code.gurobipy:
model.setObjective(
    gp.quicksum(c[i][tau] * x[i, tau] for i in range(n) for tau in range(t)),
    GRB.MAXIMIZE
)
